title: ACDLC Trace Event Schema
description: Schema for validating parent-child execution trace events enabling end-to-end task tracing across distributed worker pools

trace_id.description: Root trace identifier grouping all spans in a single end-to-end execution

parent_event_id.description: event_id of the parent span (use 'root' for the originating span)

child_event_id.description: event_id of the child span produced by this execution step

agent_id.description: Identity of the agent executing this span

tenant_id.description: Execution tenant context for multi-tenant deployments

session_id.description: Optional: groups all traces within a single user session

routing_decision_id.description: Optional: links this trace span to the ROUTE_SELECTED event that triggered it

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of span start

span_type.description: root=originating task, child=intermediate delegation, leaf=terminal execution

duration_ms.description: Span duration in milliseconds (omit if not yet completed)
